title: Multica Agent Configuration
description: Schema for a Multica agent definition. Each agent is stored as an agent.json inside a workspace/squad/agent-slug/ folder.

description.description: Short catalog summary. Human-facing metadata only — NOT injected into the runtime prompt. Max 255 Unicode code points.

instructions.description: Runtime behavior contract. Shipped to the provider at claim time as the agent's durable instructions. Persona, responsibilities, boundaries, output and escalation rules go here.

runtime_id.description: ID of the runtime this agent executes on. Must resolve to a runtime in the target workspace.

model.description: Provider model override. Empty/null = runtime default.

thinking_level.description: Thinking level for the provider. Validated at provider level; an unknown literal is rejected. Empty/null = runtime default.

custom_args.description: Extra CLI switches passed to the provider. Each element is a raw flag or argument.

custom_env.description: Secret environment variables injected into the agent's process. Use placeholder strings for actual values: {{VAULT:folder/item-name}} for Bitwarden secrets, {{SECRET:name}} for other secret references. Never commit plaintext secrets.

mcp_config.description: MCP server configuration (e.g. {"mcpServers": {...}}). Secret material — use {{VAULT:...}} and {{SECRET:...}} placeholders for API tokens and credentials. Never commit plaintext secrets.

visibility.description: Access control. 'private' gated to workspace owner/admin; 'workspace' visible to all workspace members.

max_concurrent_tasks.description: Maximum concurrent tasks this agent can run. Scheduler cap at claim time.

skills.description: List of workspace skill slugs to bind to this agent. Binding is a separate post-create operation — this field records the intended bindings for the sync script.
